errors.unauthenticated: You need to sign in to continue.
errors.rate_limited: You're doing this too often. Try again in {retryAfter} seconds.
errors.forbidden: You don't have permission for this action.
errors.edit_window_expired: The edit window for this post has expired.
errors.visibility_not_more_restrictive: You can only restrict visibility, not broaden it.
errors.self_repost: You can't repost your own post.
errors.target_unavailable: The post is no longer available.
errors.reason_not_available: This report reason is no longer available.
errors.details_required: Please provide details for the report.
errors.r2_not_configured: Media service not configured. Try again later.

validation.repost_needs_body: Add a comment to the repost.

media.upload_missing: Upload did not complete. Try again.
media.r2_not_configured: Media service not configured. Try again later.
media.add_images: Drag or click to add images ({current}/{max})

comments.empty: No comments yet. Be the first.
comments.show_more_replies: Show {count, plural, =1 {1 more reply} other {# more replies}}

banner.new_comments: {count, plural, =1 {1 new comment} other {# new comments}} — click to load

composer.visibility_locked: Not available (you can only make it more private)

delete.title: Delete this post?
delete.description: The post will disappear immediately from your profile and everyone's feed.
delete.consequence_1: Reactions and bookmarks stay attached to the post until restored.
delete.consequence_2: Comments are deleted along with the post.
delete.consequence_3: Other users' quote-reposts will show "original post removed".
delete.consequence_4_suffix: a moderator can restore it. After that, the post is permanently deleted.

block.title: Block {name}?
block.description: Blocking is mutual: neither of you will see each other's content anymore.
block.consequence_1: {name} won't appear in your feed or comments anymore.
block.consequence_2: You won't see their posts even if they're public.
block.consequence_3: {name} won't be able to see yours either.
block.consequence_4: You can remove the block any time from settings.

report.title: Report this post
report.description: Choose the reason for reporting. It will be reviewed by a moderator.
report.success_message: Report sent. Thanks for helping out.
report.block_prompt: Would you also like to block {name}? Blocking is mutual: neither of you will see each other's content anymore.
report.details_placeholder: Add useful context for moderation (max 2000 characters)

empty_states.following_home_description: Here you'll see posts from people you follow. Start exploring to find profiles and content you'll like.
empty_states.explore_no_posts_description: Nothing public yet. Publish the first post to kick things off.
empty_states.explore_ticker_no_posts_description: There are no public posts mentioning this ticker yet. Be the first.
empty_states.ticker_create_cta_authed_prefix: Kick off the conversation — write a new post with the tag

report.load_error: Couldn't load report reasons. Try again.

explore.subtitle_ticker: All public posts mentioning this coin.
explore.subtitle: Public community posts in chronological order.
explore.untracked_fallback: is not tracked in the prices module — see posts mentioning it below.
